articles.title: Blood-brain barrier scans could personalize stroke care using existing MRI data
articles.description: When a person first exhibits signs of having a stroke, the timing of treatment is critical to restore blood flow to the brain and support recovery. In addition to studying and implementing ways to treat patients faster, investigators have been studying how to make predicting and treating stroke more precise. A new study in the journal Stroke introduces a concept of brain imaging known as blood-brain core imaging, or "leaky core," that could potentially accelerate this progress and transform the way that many strokes are treated.

Despite the modest gain in the benchmark, 42 stocks from the BSE 500 index advanced in each of the five consecutive sessions between May 4 and May 08. Among these, 14 stocks posted gains in all five sessions, delivering cumulative returns of up to 25% during the period. (Data Source: ACE Equity)

articles.title: Scientists found the “holy grail” gene that could one day help humans regrow limbs
articles.description: Scientists studying axolotls, zebrafish, and mice have uncovered a shared set of genes that may one day help humans regrow lost limbs. By identifying powerful “SP genes” involved in regeneration, researchers discovered that disabling these genes stopped proper bone regrowth in salamanders and mice. They then used a gene therapy inspired by zebrafish biology to partially restore regeneration in mice, marking a major step toward future treatments that could replace damaged limbs with living tissue instead of prosthetics.

articles.title: Quote of the day by Donald Trump on success: ‘I try to learn from the past, but I plan….’
articles.description: US President Donald Trump believes that while the past is important, true enjoyment and future planning stem from concentrating on the present.

articles.title: Video: Yogi Adityanath gifts saffron gamcha to Suvendu Adhikari at his oath-taking
articles.description: Video Yogi Adityanath gifts saffron gamcha to Suvendu Adhikari at his oathtaking

articles.title: Moscow marks Victory Day with a Red Square parade under tight security
articles.description: Security was tight in Moscow as Putin and several foreign leaders attended the parade, even as a U.S.-brokered three-day ceasefire eased concerns about possible Ukrainian attempts to disrupt the festivities.

articles.title: Georgia town reinstates police force days after mayor fired entire department
articles.description: A small Georgia town reinstated its entire police force days after the mayor shut down the department, leaving the community without law enforcement.

articles.title: Kerala CM debate: Kharge to hold crucial talks with senior leaders today evening
articles.description: Congress leader Rahul Gandhi is likely to meet the Kerala leaders only after a consensus emerges from the meeting chaired by Mr. Kharge

articles.title: Tamil Nadu government formation suspense continues; VCK yet to declare its stand
articles.description: The TVK, which won 108 seats, sought support from several smaller camps secure 118 seats in the 234-seat assembly

articles.title: Tamil Nadu government formation LIVE: VCK to support TVK, announcement soon
articles.description: Thirumavalavan expected to officially announce the party’s decision soon

articles.title: 126 MLAs-elect in T.N. have criminal cases pending against them; TVK tops list with 41
articles.description: As many as 19 MLAs-elect from the TVK, 14 each from the AIADMK and the DMK, two each from the Congress and the PMK, and one each from the AMMK, the CPI, the DMDK, the IUML, and the VCK have declared that serious criminal cases were pending against them

articles.title: CM Revanth Reddy outlines Hyderabad’s future urban vision at Parliamentary Standing Committee meeting
articles.description: Telangana CM Revanth Reddy emphasises a multi-faceted approach to urban planning as part of the ambitious ‘Telangana Rising-2047’ Master Plan

topStories.title: A cruise ship nightmare, and the day Ted Turner became an MLB manager: The news quiz
topStories.description: President Donald Trump gets revenge, celebrities hit the carpet for the Met Gala, and a purported Jeffrey Epstein suicide note is unsealed.

topStories.title: Trump bypasses media gatekeepers as Gov Sanders reveals legacy outlets are losing their grip
topStories.description: Gov. Sanders claims the mainstream media's hostility toward Trump stems from his ability to reach voters directly without relying on legacy news outlets.

topStories.title: Trump turns sights on Bill Cassidy, Thomas Massie after decisive Indiana primary victories
topStories.description: Trump and allies target Sen. Bill Cassidy and Rep. Thomas Massie in upcoming GOP primaries after decisive wins over Indiana state senators this week.

topStories.title: Medicaid fraud fears grow amid massive red state billing spike in sector that also plagued Minnesota
topStories.description: North Carolina's state auditor says a massive surge in Medicaid autism therapy billings signals potential waste, fraud, and abuse in the system.

topStories.title: With GOP wins on election maps, Democrats have a steeper climb to victory
topStories.description: Republicans are eight seats closer to keeping control of the House, making Democrats’ climb toward reclaiming power in November more difficult.

topStories.title: Top Maryland Democrat is fighting for his job after resisting redistricting plan
topStories.description: Maryland Senate President Bill Ferguson (D) faces a tough primary challenge after defying Democratic leaders including Gov. Wes Moore on redistricting.

topStories.title: National mood is against Republicans, but redistricting could help prop them up
topStories.description: The national political landscape looks bad for President Trump and Republicans, but recent wins in the redistricting fight could soften the blow they might have suffered without them.

topStories.title: Democrats shy away from questions on whether Harris should run for president in 2028
topStories.description: House Democrats are shying away from endorsing Kamala Harris for a 2028 presidential run as names like Newsom, Shapiro and Whitmer are also being discussed.

dailyNews.title: A vast dam across the Bering Strait could stop the AMOC collapsing
dailyNews.description: If a key ocean current collapses it could plunge northern Europe into a big freeze. Now researchers are weighing up a drastic intervention – building a 130-kilometre-wide dam between the US and Russia

dailyNews.title: Frontier Airlines jet reports striking an individual on runway at Denver airport
dailyNews.description: A Frontier Airlines flight taking off for Los Angeles from Denver International Airport on Thursday night appeared to strike an individual walking on runway 17L.

dailyNews.title: Goldman Sees Fed Cuts Delayed to December, March on Inflation
dailyNews.description: Goldman Sachs said it pushed back expectations for the US Federal Reserve’s next two rate cuts by one quarter to December 2026 and March 2027 as inflation proves stickier than anticipated.

dailyNews.title: Wembanyama powers Spurs past T-Wolves as Knicks beat Sixers in NBA playoffs
dailyNews.description: San Antonio take 2-1 semifinal series lead over Minnesota, while New York Knicks are 3-0 up against Philadelphia 76ers.

dailyNews.title: ABC argues Trump administration is trying to chill free speech
dailyNews.description: In a filing, ABC accuses the Trump administration of trying to chill its constitutionally protected free speech. The point of contention: "The View," and whether it's subject to equal time rules.

dailyNews.title: Trump says Russia and Ukraine have agreed to his request for a 3-day ceasefire
dailyNews.description: President Volodymyr Zelenskyy and Yuri Ushakov, President Vladimir Putin's foreign affairs adviser, both confirmed the agreement for a three-day ceasefire and an exchange of prisoners.

dailyNews.title: Two 'dangerous' inmates escape Kentucky detention center, sparking multi-agency manhunt across region
dailyNews.description: Two inmates described as dangerous escaped from a Kentucky detention center Friday, prompting a multi-agency manhunt led by Kentucky State Police.

dailyNews.title: U.S. fires on 2 more tankers as Washington awaits Iran response on deal
dailyNews.description: The U.S. military says its forces fired on two Iran-flagged oil tankers to stop them from docking at an Iranian port in violation of the U.S. blockade in the area.

dailyNews.title: Iran accuses US of 'reckless military adventure'
dailyNews.description: Abbas Araghchi says the US attacks each time there is a diplomatic solution on the table.

dailyNews.title: Pentagon says 1 survivor after latest strike on alleged drug boat kills 2
dailyNews.description: The U.S. military's latest strike on an alleged drug-trafficking boat in the eastern Pacific Ocean killed two men Friday while leaving one survivor.

dailyNews.title: RFK Jr. launches plan to curb antidepressant 'overprescription'
dailyNews.description: A new federal initiative aims to curb "overprescribing" of psychiatric medications while emphasizing holistic care.

dailyNews.title: Man who survived hantavirus 24 years ago, but lost mom and sister, recounts experience
dailyNews.description: In 2002, Zermeño found out he contracted hantavirus after cleaning the family house following the death of his mother and sister. He had been exposed to rodent droppings and became infected.

topStories.title: Trump Administration Wants to Strip 12 Immigrants of U.S. Citizenship
topStories.description: The targeted Americans are accused of misdeeds that can qualify them to lose citizenship, but denaturalization has rarely been invoked in the past.

topStories.title: White House prepares to replace FDA leader Marty Makary amid agency turmoil
topStories.description: FDA Commissioner Marty Makary has faced criticism over his leadership of the agency that oversees vaccine and drug approvals.

topStories.title: U.S. and Iran exchange fire as Trump says ceasefire still holds
topStories.description: U.S. fighter jets struck two Iranian oil tankers accused of violating a U.S. blockade in the Strait of Hormuz, as Iran launched new missile and drone attacks targeting the United Arab Emirates. NBC News’ Courtney Kube reports.

topStories.title: Trump Plans to Fire F.D.A. Commissioner Marty Makary
topStories.description: Dr. Makary has been a supporter of the Make American Healthy Again Movement but made some enemies in the administration over vaping, the abortion pill and rejections of new drugs.

topStories.title: Facing Pressure, Trump Officials Reject Claims They’re Softening on Immigration
topStories.description: Immigration hard-liners have grown frustrated with the level of deportations and the Department of Homeland Security’s attempts, under its new secretary, to stay under the radar.

dailyNews.title: Trump Gave Out a No-Bid Contract to Turn D.C.’s Reflecting Pool Blue
dailyNews.description: President Trump handpicked a firm he said had worked on his swimming pool to repair the iconic site near the Lincoln Memorial.

dailyNews.title: Why the Trump-Xi Summit Matters, Even if Little Seems to Come of It
dailyNews.description: The war in Iran, trade, artificial intelligence and Taiwan are expected to be on the agenda. But expectations are modest.

dailyNews.title: China’s Exports and Imports Set Records in April Amid High Energy Costs
dailyNews.description: The country’s exports surged and its trade surplus with the United States widened ahead of President Trump’s scheduled visit next week to Beijing.

dailyNews.title: 6 videos that stood out in the Pentagon's new UFO drop
dailyNews.description: The Pentagon on Friday began releasing hundreds of files on UFOs after President Trump ordered the documents to be made public. CBS News Pentagon reporter Eleanor Watson reviewed the 28 videos in the first batch of files and chose six that stood out to her the most.

dailyNews.title: Trump says UFO files released to maximize transparency
dailyNews.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth said it's time for the American people see it for themselves, as the Pentagon started releasing previously classified documents related to UFOs and UAPs. CBS News Pentagon reporter Eleanor Watson has more.

dailyNews.title: Iran focus at Trump-Xi summit may delay progress on tariffs, rare earths
dailyNews.description: Thanks to the Iran war, big issues for U.S. businesses like rare earths and supply chains may take a back seat on the agenda for the Trump-Xi summit.

dailyNews.title: Trump's $1 million 'Gold Card' fails to catch on among the world's wealthy
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump's "Gold Card," which promised U.S. residency in "record time," has been dogged by delays and legal questions.

dailyNews.title: U.S. says it struck two Iran-flagged oil tankers trying to skirt blockade
dailyNews.description: The shaky U.S. ceasefire with Iran has been repeatedly undermined this week, even as President Donald Trump insists it remains in effect.

dailyNews.title: Trump threatens EU with ‘much higher’ tariffs if no trade deal signed by new deadline
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump said he will give the European Union until July 4 to ratify its trade agreement with the U.S.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.

dailyNews.title: Beijing Signals Readiness to Talk to Trump's Team, Even Old Foes
dailyNews.description: The Chinese foreign minister spoke by phone with Marco Rubio, the new secretary of state who has been a critic of Beijing.
